name: @cinatra-ai/apollo-prospecting-agent
description: Stateless leaf agent that takes Apollo prospecting criteria (organizationDomains + titlePatterns) and discovers + persists contacts through the crm_* facade. Upserts an account per domain (crm_account_search + crm_account_create/update), runs Apollo people-search, and persists each contact via crm_contact_create (a plain create — no server-side dedup, so repeated runs may create duplicates; cleanup/dedup is outside this leaf agent). Optionally adds the new contacts to a CRM list (crm_list_member_add).
